mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invoice_record (order_id, nuonuo_serial_no, tenant_id, status, req_payload, res_payload, error_msg, retry_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{nuonuoSerialNo}, #{tenantId}, #{status}, #{reqPayload}, #{resPayload}, #{errorMsg}, #{retryCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE invoice_record SET req_payload = #{payload}, res_payload = NULL, error_msg = NULL, status = #{newStatus}, retry_count = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = #{oldStatus}
UPDATE invoice_record SET status = #{newStatus}, res_payload = #{resPayload}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE nuonuo_serial_no = #{nuonuoSerialNo} AND status = #{oldStatus}
